description: Create a new staff user account for a flight operations coordinator in the Aerobridge admin panel (http://localhost:8000/admin/) using the admin credentials (Username: 'admin', Password: 'adminpass123'). The new account must have the username 'ops_coordinator', password 'FlightOps2024!', first name 'Maria', last name 'Rodriguez', and email 'maria.rodriguez@skyviewaerial.io'. Ensure the account is granted staff status but is not a superuser.
